# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.

Write secure code.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-api-se
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.thirdparty.com
  - auth.thirdparty.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  - number: 80
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "."
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-database-se
spec:
  hosts:
  - db.external.com
  - redis.external.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: postgres
    protocol: TCP
  - number: 6379
    name: redis
    protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "."
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-api-vs
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.thirdparty.com
  - auth.thirdparty.com
  http:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: api.thirdparty.com
        port:
          number: 443
        subset: v1
    timeout: 30s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 10s
    fault:
      delay:
        percent: 10
        fixedDelay: 500ms
    mirror:
      host: logging-service.default.svc.cluster.local
      port:
        number: 80
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-database-vs
spec:
  hosts:
  - db.external.com
  - redis.external.com
  http:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: db.external.com
        port:
          number: 5432
        subset: primary
    timeout: 60s
    retries:
      attempts: 2
      perTryTimeout: 30s
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-api-dr
spec:
  host: api.thirdparty.com
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      http:
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 100
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 10
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: api.thirdparty.com
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-db-dr
spec:
  host: db.external.com
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      http:
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 50
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 5
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 50
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveErrors: 3
      interval: 10s
      baseEjectionTime: 10s
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: db.external.com
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: secure-external-api-se
spec:
  hosts:
  - secure.api.thirdparty.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "."
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: secure-external-api-vs
spec:
  hosts:
  - secure.api.thirdparty.com
  http:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: secure.api.thirdparty.com
        port:
          number: 443
        subset: secure
    timeout: 30s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 10s
    fault:
      delay:
        percent: 5
        fixedDelay: 200ms
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: secure-external-api-dr
spec:
  host: secure.api.thirdparty.com
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      http:
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 100
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 10
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: secure.api.thirdparty.com
    loadBalancer:
      simple: LEAST_CONN
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-internal-se
spec:
  hosts:
  - internal.api.thirdparty.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "."
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-internal-vs
spec:
  hosts:
  - internal.api.thirdparty.com
  http:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: internal.api.thirdparty.com
        port:
          number: 443
        subset: internal
    timeout: 30s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 10s
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-internal-dr
spec:
  host: internal.api.thirdparty.com
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      http:
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 100
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 10
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: internal.api.thirdparty.com
    loadBalancer:
      simple: LEAST_CONN
